channel.title: Vim on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Vim on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog

item.title: How to Setup Vim
item.description: How to setup vim Install vundle vundle is a plugin manage tools for vim git clone https://github.com/VundleVim/Vundle.vim.git ~/.vim/bundle/Vundle.vim Edit vim configure file cat > ~/.vimrc <<EOF set nocompatible " be iMproved, required filetype off " required syntax on " set the runtime path to include Vundle and initialize set rtp+=~/.vim/bundle/Vundle.vim call vundle#begin() " alternatively, pass a path where Vundle should install plugins "call vundle#begin('~/some/path/here') " let Vundle manage Vundle, required Plugin 'VundleVim/Vundle.
